title: Infosys collaborates with Citizens on AI-first Innovation Hub in Bengaluru
detailed_summary: Infosys announced a collaboration with Citizens Financial Group to support the launch of Citizens' AI-first Innovation Hub in Bengaluru, India. Infosys is one of Citizens' strategic delivery partners supporting AI development and will contribute AI, cloud, and cybersecurity expertise. The collaboration will use Infosys Topaz Fabric to support scalable, agent-ready capabilities intended to speed delivery of new financial products and digital services and advance Citizens' AI-first operating model. No deal value, duration, or financial impact was disclosed.

partnerships_or_deals.section_heading: Infosys Collaborates with Citizens on AI-First Innovation Hub to Accelerate the Future of Banking

important_text_spans.text: Infosys (NSE, BSE, NYSE: INFY), a global leader in next-generation digital services and consulting, today announced its collaboration with Citizens (NYSE: CFG), one of the oldest and largest financial institutions in the US, to support the launch of the bank's AI-first Innovation Hub in Bengaluru, India.
important_text_spans.section_heading: Infosys Collaborates with Citizens on AI-First Innovation Hub to Accelerate the Future of Banking
important_text_spans.reason: Supports the main collaboration and launch location.

important_text_spans.text: As one of Citizens strategic delivery partners supporting AI development, Infosys will contribute its AI, cloud, and cybersecurity expertise to help advance Citizens' AI-first operating model.
important_text_spans.section_heading: Infosys Collaborates with Citizens on AI-First Innovation Hub to Accelerate the Future of Banking
important_text_spans.reason: Identifies Infosys' role and capabilities in the engagement.

important_text_spans.text: Leveraging Infosys Topaz Fabric, a specialized agentic services suite featuring a multi-layer AI fabric that integrates infrastructure, models, data, applications, and workflows into a cohesive, agent-ready ecosystem, Infosys will support the development of scalable, agent-ready capabilities designed to simplify and increase the speed of delivery of new financial products and digital services.
important_text_spans.section_heading: Infosys Collaborates with Citizens on AI-First Innovation Hub to Accelerate the Future of Banking
important_text_spans.reason: Shows the Infosys platform used and the intended business capability.

processing_notes: No deal value, duration, or financial impact was disclosed. Infosys Topaz Fabric was treated as supporting context for the partnership rather than a separate product launch or platform event.
